strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Strong engineering culture and leadership track record (TDD, CI/CD, team scaling at RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited explicit fintech or credit-risk system experience (no mention of fintech infrastructure or regulated environments)
No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes commercial contexts (agentic work appears early-stage)
Weaker alignment with model-agnostic architecture requirements (no clear focus on avoiding provider dependency)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and event-driven system expertise, with recent involvement in AI-agent tooling. However, the resume lacks critical fintech infrastructure experience and clear evidence of deploying multi-agent systems in regulated, high-stakes environments. His technical leadership and disciplined engineering practices are assets, but the role's core requirements (agentic AI in fintech) are not fully met by his documented experience.
